TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == An-tung-niÔľéBanÔľéLye-won-how-ke "kamu nu He-lan, Antoni van Leeuwenhoek, pangihan tu kamu nu He-lan, (…Ďn'toňźni v…Ďn 'leňźu…ô ňĆ…¶uk),anucaay pabelin Lu-how-ke, Lye-won-ho-e, 1632 a mihca 10 a bulad 24 a demiad katukuh 1723 a mihca 8 a bulad 26 a demiad" u lecuh i He-lan kapulung a kanatal Tay-al-bu-te a pow-u-sye-sya atu bwahngu sye-cya. ŚģČśĚĪŚįľ¬∑ŤĆÉ‚Äßťõ∑śĖáťúćŚÖč(Ťć∑Ťė≠Ť™ě:Antoni van Leeuwenhoek,Ťć∑Ťė≠Ť™ěÁôľťü≥:(…Ďn'toňźni v…Ďn 'leňźu…ô ňĆ…¶uk), . nilaculan saayaw mazih niza ku adidi'ay nu mauzipay, pasu cilekay, nauyaanay aadiupan atu zumaay a adidi'ay nu mauzipay, sakasa pangangan han "nauyaanay nu migingkiway tu aadupan atu ama nu migingkiway tu cilekay". musakamu ciniza tu kaazih tu suluy, i katuuday a aadupan mikinsa tuhenian. . niza ciniza mala u mabidangay, atu uyaanay a ziday niza atu migingkiway a tademaw tu mahiza, maazih niza ku hung-sye-ciw atu wi-sye-kwan u maniyul ku tungmay atu cinmayn amilinlaku. u pigingikiw niza maawas tu ku makay migingkiway tu imelang katukuh tu migingkiway tu mulangaway ahebal ku gagingkiwan. . ci Lye-won-how-ke u miecaway nu mipacakayay tu dawa, pakala tu 27 ku mihcaan i niyazu niza Tay-al-bu-te mala kunuing nu kenseyhu, caay piecaw ciniza tu canacanan a ke-sya atu gizice, uyza sa minanam amatineng ahicaen misanga' atu micukaymas tu bwahngu. itawya, makayza ciniza tu 300 a kayadah nu tigami pasay Lun-tun hwang-cya sye-huy atu kautuday nu zumaay a O-cow tademaw pakatukuh cinizaay micukaymas mitapal tu bwahngu. makay hanulima nisanga'an a bwahngu, asayaway mitapal a musakamu tu adidi'ay nu mauzipay, itawya ciniza uyni mauzipay panganga han tu "animalcules". namahiza, u saayaway aca ciniza mikilu mitapal tu ci-sen-wi, cilekay, suluy, wi-sye-kwanay a cilil nu izang a ke-sye-cya. "animalcules".ś≠§Ś§Ė, . ci Lye-won-how-ke mitapal tu suluy niza, i bwahngu a pitapal maazih ku adidi'ay suluy, baluhay anipaketun tu kamu, cisuluy uyza u adidi'ay a suluy micumud tu pilasan. u kamu niza i kauzipan niza u satabakiay a nikaazih, a mitapal tu mauzipay i nanum atu mauzipay i tukus, ahemi'ay aadupan, kasaayam, kasabuting atu micucuay a aadupan tu adidi'ay suluy, sibaluhay tu ku nipaketun, cisuliuy uyza u adidi'ay a suluy micumud i pilasan aizaw. . i kauzipay niza mimelmel misanga' tu macaliway ku 300 ku galasu nu dadingu, amisanga' tu 400 a lamangan kayadah ku bwahngu, zuma iza ku 9 a lamanngan katukuh ayza iza henay ku micukaymasay. mapatay tu ci Ley-wen-he-ke, cayi' t uku mikilulay a migingkiw, wi-sen-su-sye micumud tu duutay a ziday. sakay wi-sen-su-syenayi' tu ku manamuhay a lalekalan, azaaw tu minanamay tu wi-sen-su a gizice, patatenga' ku katuuday kasatiman ku wi-sen-su, nika sakay syakay a nikalilid adidi' anucaay caay kalilid. . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == an-tuŇč-ni*ban*r~…ĺj…ô-won-ńßow-k…ô "kamu nu ńß…ô-r~…ĺan, antoni *an r~…ĺ…ô…ôuw…ônńßo…ôk, paŇčińßan tu kamu nu ńß…ô-r~…ĺan, (*n Ē~ °to*ni **n Ē~ °r~…ĺ…ô*u…ô **uk),anu ¶aaj pab…ôr~…ĺin r~…ĺu-ńßow-k…ô, r~…ĺj…ô-won-ńßo-…ô, **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad" u r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß i ńß…ô-r~…ĺan kapur~…ĺuŇč a kanatar~…ĺ taj-ar~…ĺ-bu-t…ô a pow-u-sj…ô-sja atu bwańßŇču sj…ô- ¶ja. **********(***:antoni *an r~…ĺ…ô…ôuw…ônńßo…ôk,*****:(*n Ē~ °to*ni **n Ē~ °r~…ĺ…ô*u…ô **uk), . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan saajaw mazińß niza ku adidi Ē~ °aj nu mauzipaj, pasu ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj, naujaanaj aadiupan atu zumaaj a adidi Ē~ °aj nu mauzipaj, sakasa paŇčaŇčan ńßan "naujaanaj nu migiŇčkiwaj tu aadupan atu ama nu migiŇčkiwaj tu ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj". musakamu ¶iniza tu kaazińß tu sur~…ĺuj, i katuudaj a aadupan mikinsa tuńß…ônian. . niza ¶iniza mar~…ĺa u mabidaŇčaj, atu ujaanaj a zidaj niza atu migiŇčkiwaj a tad…ômaw tu mańßiza, maazińß niza ku ńßuŇč-sj…ô- ¶iw atu wi-sj…ô-kwan u manijur~…ĺ ku tuŇčmaj atu ¶inmajn amir~…ĺinr~…ĺaku. u pigiŇčikiw niza maawas tu ku makaj migiŇčkiwaj tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč katukuńß tu migiŇčkiwaj tu mur~…ĺaŇčawaj ańß…ôbar~…ĺ ku gagiŇčkiwan. . ¶i r~…ĺj…ô-won-ńßow-k…ô u mi…ô ¶awaj nu mipa ¶akajaj tu dawa, pakar~…ĺa tu ** ku mińß ¶aan i nijazu niza taj-ar~…ĺ-bu-t…ô mar~…ĺa kunuiŇč nu k…ôns…ôńßu, ¶aaj pi…ô ¶aw ¶iniza tu ¶ana ¶anan a k…ô-sja atu gizi ¶…ô, ujza sa minanam amatin…ôŇč ańßi ¶a…ôn misaŇča Ē~ ° atu mi ¶ukajmas tu bwańßŇču. itawja, makajza ¶iniza tu *** a kajadańß nu tigami pasaj r~…ĺun-tun ńßwaŇč- ¶ja sj…ô-ńßuj atu kautudaj nu zumaaj a o- ¶ow tad…ômaw pakatukuńß ¶inizaaj mi ¶ukajmas mitapar~…ĺ tu bwańßŇču. makaj ńßanur~…ĺima nisaŇča Ē~ °an a bwańßŇču, asajawaj mitapar~…ĺ a musakamu tu adidi Ē~ °aj nu mauzipaj, itawja ¶iniza ujni mauzipaj paŇčaŇča ńßan tu "animar~…ĺ ¶ur~…ĺ…ôs". namańßiza, u saajawaj a ¶a ¶iniza mikir~…ĺu mitapar~…ĺ tu ¶i-s…ôn-wi, ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj, sur~…ĺuj, wi-sj…ô-kwanaj a ¶ir~…ĺir~…ĺ nu izaŇč a k…ô-sj…ô- ¶ja. "animar~…ĺ ¶ur~…ĺ…ôs".**, . ¶i r~…ĺj…ô-won-ńßow-k…ô mitapar~…ĺ tu sur~…ĺuj niza, i bwańßŇču a pitapar~…ĺ maazińß ku adidi Ē~ °aj sur~…ĺuj, bar~…ĺuńßaj anipak…ôtun tu kamu, ¶isur~…ĺuj ujza u adidi Ē~ °aj a sur~…ĺuj mi ¶umud tu pir~…ĺasan. u kamu niza i kauzipan niza u satabakiaj a nikaazińß, a mitapar~…ĺ tu mauzipaj i nanum atu mauzipaj i tukus, ańß…ômi Ē~ °aj aadupan, kasaajam, kasabutiŇč atu mi ¶u ¶uaj a aadupan tu adidi Ē~ °aj sur~…ĺuj, sibar~…ĺuńßaj tu ku nipak…ôtun, ¶isur~…ĺiuj ujza u adidi Ē~ °aj a sur~…ĺuj mi ¶umud i pir~…ĺasan aizaw. . i kauzipaj niza mim…ôr~…ĺm…ôr~…ĺ misaŇča Ē~ ° tu ma ¶ar~…ĺiwaj ku *** ku gar~…ĺasu nu dadiŇču, amisaŇča Ē~ ° tu *** a r~…ĺamaŇčan kajadańß ku bwańßŇču, zuma iza ku * a r~…ĺamanŇčan katukuńß ajza iza ńß…ônaj ku mi ¶ukajmasaj. mapataj tu ¶i r~…ĺ…ô-w…ôn-ńß…ô-k…ô, ¶aji Ē~ ° t uku mikir~…ĺur~…ĺaj a migiŇčkiw, wi-s…ôn-su-sj…ô mi ¶umud tu duutaj a zidaj. sakaj wi-s…ôn-su-sj…ônaji Ē~ ° tu ku manamuńßaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan, azaaw tu minanamaj tu wi-s…ôn-su a gizi ¶…ô, patat…ôŇča Ē~ ° ku katuudaj kasatiman ku wi-s…ôn-su, nika sakaj sjakaj a nikar~…ĺir~…ĺid adidi Ē~ ° anu ¶aaj ¶aaj kar~…ĺir~…ĺid. . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kakiliman == An-tung-niÔľéBanÔľéLye-won-how-ke "kamu nu He-lan, Antoni van Leeuwenhoek, pangihan tu kamu nu He-lan, (…Ďn'toňźni v…Ďn 'leňźu…ô ňĆ…¶uk),anucaay pabelin Lu-how-ke, Lye-won-ho-e, 1632 a mihca 10 a bulad 24 a demiad katukuh 1723 a mihca 8 a bulad 26 a demiad" u lecuh i He-lan kapulung a kanatal Tay-al-bu-te a pow-u-sye-sya atu bwahngu sye-cya. ŚģČśĚĪŚįľ¬∑ŤĆÉ‚Äßťõ∑śĖáťúćŚÖč(Ťć∑Ťė≠Ť™ě:Antoni van Leeuwenhoek,Ťć∑Ťė≠Ť™ěÁôľťü≥:(…Ďn'toňźni v…Ďn 'leňźu…ô ňĆ…¶uk), . nilaculan saayaw mazih niza ku adidi'ay nu mauzipay, pasu cilekay, nauyaanay aadiupan atu zumaay a adidi'ay nu mauzipay, sakasa pangangan han "nauyaanay nu migingkiway tu aadupan atu ama nu migingkiway tu cilekay". musakamu ciniza tu kaazih tu suluy, i katuuday a aadupan mikinsa tuhenian. . niza ciniza mala u mabidangay, atu uyaanay a ziday niza atu migingkiway a tademaw tu mahiza, maazih niza ku hung-sye-ciw atu wi-sye-kwan u maniyul ku tungmay atu cinmayn amilinlaku. u pigingikiw niza maawas tu ku makay migingkiway tu imelang katukuh tu migingkiway tu mulangaway ahebal ku gagingkiwan. . ci Lye-won-how-ke u miecaway nu mipacakayay tu dawa, pakala tu 27 ku mihcaan i niyazu niza Tay-al-bu-te mala kunuing nu kenseyhu, caay piecaw ciniza tu canacanan a ke-sya atu gizice, uyza sa minanam amatineng ahicaen misanga' atu micukaymas tu bwahngu. itawya, makayza ciniza tu 300 a kayadah nu tigami pasay Lun-tun hwang-cya sye-huy atu kautuday nu zumaay a O-cow tademaw pakatukuh cinizaay micukaymas mitapal tu bwahngu. makay hanulima nisanga'an a bwahngu, asayaway mitapal a musakamu tu adidi'ay nu mauzipay, itawya ciniza uyni mauzipay panganga han tu "animalcules". namahiza, u saayaway aca ciniza mikilu mitapal tu ci-sen-wi, cilekay, suluy, wi-sye-kwanay a cilil nu izang a ke-sye-cya. "animalcules".ś≠§Ś§Ė, . ci Lye-won-how-ke mitapal tu suluy niza, i bwahngu a pitapal maazih ku adidi'ay suluy, baluhay anipaketun tu kamu, cisuluy uyza u adidi'ay a suluy micumud tu pilasan. u kamu niza i kauzipan niza u satabakiay a nikaazih, a mitapal tu mauzipay i nanum atu mauzipay i tukus, ahemi'ay aadupan, kasaayam, kasabuting atu micucuay a aadupan tu adidi'ay suluy, sibaluhay tu ku nipaketun, cisuliuy uyza u adidi'ay a suluy micumud i pilasan aizaw. . i kauzipay niza mimelmel misanga' tu macaliway ku 300 ku galasu nu dadingu, amisanga' tu 400 a lamangan kayadah ku bwahngu, zuma iza ku 9 a lamanngan katukuh ayza iza henay ku micukaymasay. mapatay tu ci Ley-wen-he-ke, cayi' t uku mikilulay a migingkiw, wi-sen-su-sye micumud tu duutay a ziday. sakay wi-sen-su-syenayi' tu ku manamuhay a lalekalan, azaaw tu minanamay tu wi-sen-su a gizice, patatenga' ku katuuday kasatiman ku wi-sen-su, nika sakay syakay a nikalilid adidi' anucaay caay kalilid. . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan

pab…ôr~…ĺin r~…ĺu-ńßow-k…ô, r~…ĺj…ô-won-ńßo-…ô, **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad" u r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß i ńß…ô-r~…ĺan kapur~…ĺuŇč a kanatar~…ĺ °aj nu mauzipaj, pasu ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj, naujaanaj aadiupan atu zumaaj a adidi Ē~ °aj nu mauzipaj, sakasa paŇčaŇčan ńßan "naujaanaj nu migiŇčkiwaj tu aadupan atu ama nu migiŇčkiwaj tu ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj". musakamu ¶iniza tu kaazińß tu sur~…ĺuj, i katuudaj a aadupan mikinsa tuńß…ônian. . niza ¶iniza mar~…ĺa u mabidaŇčaj, atu ujaanaj a zidaj niza atu migiŇčkiwaj a tad…ômaw tu mańßiza, maazińß niza ku ńßuŇč-sj…ô- ¶iw atu wi-sj…ô-kwan u manijur~…ĺ ku tuŇčmaj atu ¶inmajn amir~…ĺinr~…ĺaku. u pigiŇčikiw niza maawas tu ku makaj migiŇčkiwaj tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč katukuńß tu migiŇčkiwaj tu mur~…ĺaŇčawaj ańß…ôbar~…ĺ ku gagiŇčkiwan. . ¶i r~…ĺj…ô-won-ńßow-k…ô u mi…ô ¶awaj nu mipa ¶akajaj tu dawa, pakar~…ĺa tu ** ku mińß ¶aan i nijazu niza taj-ar~…ĺ-bu-t…ô mar~…ĺa kunuiŇč nu k…ôns…ôńßu, ¶aaj pi…ô ¶aw ¶iniza tu ¶ana ¶anan a k…ô-sja atu gizi ¶…ô, ujza sa minanam amatin…ôŇč ańßi ¶a…ôn misaŇča Ē~ ° atu mi ¶ukajmas tu bwańßŇču. itawja, makajza ¶iniza tu *** a kajadańß nu tigami pasaj r~…ĺun-tun ńßwaŇč- ¶ja sj…ô-ńßuj atu kautudaj nu zumaaj a o- ¶ow tad…ômaw pakatukuńß ¶inizaaj mi ¶ukajmas mitapar~…ĺ tu bwańßŇču. makaj ńßanur~…ĺima nisaŇča Ē~ °an a bwańßŇču, asajawaj mitapar~…ĺ a musakamu tu adidi Ē~ °aj nu mauzipaj, itawja ¶iniza ujni mauzipaj paŇčaŇča ńßan tu "animar~…ĺ ¶ur~…ĺ…ôs". namańßiza, u saajawaj a ¶a ¶iniza mikir~…ĺu mitapar~…ĺ tu ¶i-s…ôn-wi, ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj, sur~…ĺuj, wi-sj…ô-kwanaj a ¶ir~…ĺir~…ĺ nu izaŇč a k…ô-sj…ô- ¶ja. "animar~…ĺ ¶ur~…ĺ…ôs".**, . ¶i r~…ĺj…ô-won-ńßow-k…ô mitapar~…ĺ tu sur~…ĺuj niza, i bwańßŇču a pitapar~…ĺ maazińß ku adidi Ē~ °aj sur~…ĺuj, bar~…ĺuńßaj anipak…ôtun tu kamu, ¶isur~…ĺuj ujza u adidi Ē~ °aj a sur~…ĺuj mi ¶umud tu pir~…ĺasan. u kamu niza i kauzipan niza u satabakiaj a nikaazińß, a mitapar~…ĺ tu mauzipaj i nanum atu mauzipaj i tukus, ańß…ômi Ē~ °aj aadupan, kasaajam, kasabutiŇč atu mi ¶u ¶uaj a aadupan tu adidi Ē~ °aj sur~…ĺuj, sibar~…ĺuńßaj tu ku nipak…ôtun, ¶isur~…ĺiuj ujza u adidi Ē~ °aj a sur~…ĺuj mi ¶umud i pir~…ĺasan aizaw. . i kauzipaj niza mim…ôr~…ĺm…ôr~…ĺ misaŇča Ē~ ° tu ma ¶ar~…ĺiwaj ku *** ku gar~…ĺasu nu dadiŇču, amisaŇča Ē~ ° tu *** a r~…ĺamaŇčan kajadańß ku bwańßŇču, zuma iza ku * a r~…ĺamanŇčan katukuńß ajza iza ńß…ônaj ku mi ¶ukajmasaj. mapataj tu ¶i r~…ĺ…ô-w…ôn-ńß…ô-k…ô, ¶aji Ē~ ° t uku mikir~…ĺur~…ĺaj a migiŇčkiw, wi-s…ôn-su-sj…ô mi ¶umud tu duutaj a zidaj. sakaj wi-s…ôn-su-sj…ônaji Ē~ ° tu ku manamuńßaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan, azaaw tu minanamaj tu wi-s…ôn-su a gizi ¶…ô, patat…ôŇča Ē~ ° ku katuudaj kasatiman ku wi-s…ôn-su, nika sakaj sjakaj a nikar~…ĺir~…ĺid adidi Ē~ ° anu ¶aaj ¶aaj kar~…ĺir~…ĺid. . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
